goals.title: Fix rejected Floor Overview office-component repositioning. Prior imp...
goals.objective: Fix rejected Floor Overview office-component repositioning. Prior implementation only moved the preview shell and inspector rail; user says office component rearrangement was not done. Deliver an observable rearrangement of the actual FloorViewport office/floor map components/rooms, preserve Focused and Classic contracts, verify with failing-first placement tests plus browser screenshot evidence.

successCriteria.scenario: Browser Overview 1440/1220 renders actual data-room-id room placements in the operator-chain office arrangement
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: output/playwright/office-component-reposition-fix-results.json plus overview screenshots show ops/impl left, validation/review/research right stack, commons lower-center
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: RED: pnpm dashboard floor-geometry test failed on old coords; GREEN: output/playwright/office-component-reposition-fix-results.json PASS with Overview 1440/1220 roomPlacements ops-control 3/3/30/20, impl-office 3/27/30/31, validation-office 61/3/30/22, review-office 61/29/30/23, research-lab 61/58/30/22, project-main 34/60/24/32; screenshots output/playwright/office-component-reposition-fix/overview-1440.png and overview-1220.png; cleanup: chrome 9233 and vite 3006 listeners closed

successCriteria.scenario: Responsive boundary: Overview 1220 has no horizontal overflow, map/rail do not overlap, and right-column offices remain ordered validation -> review -> research
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Browser QA PASS in output/playwright/office-component-reposition-fix-results.json for overview-1220: no horizontal overflow, map/rail separation preserved, right-side offices ordered validation -> review -> research; screenshot output/playwright/office-component-reposition-fix/overview-1220.png; cleanup: chrome 9233 and vite 3006 listeners closed

successCriteria.scenario: Regression: Focused remains workbench-only and Classic renders safely at 1440 and 1220 after shared room geometry move
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: pnpm dashboard tests/build pass plus browser QA focused-1220/focused-1440/classic-1440/classic-1220 PASS in output/playwright/office-component-reposition-fix-results.json
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Regression proof: pnpm.cmd --filter @conitens/dashboard test PASS 144/144; pnpm.cmd --filter @conitens/dashboard build PASS; browser QA PASS for focused-1220, focused-1440, classic-1440, classic-1220 in output/playwright/office-component-reposition-fix-results.json; read-only visual/operator reviewers PASS; cleanup: chrome 9233 and vite 3006 listeners closed

goals.blockedReason: Product work complete and criteria C001-C003 pass, but completed legacy Codex goal blocks final aggregate reconciliation in this thread; see .omo/evidence/office-component-reposition-fix-codex-goal-snapshot.json. Verification: tests 144/144, build pass, browser QA PASS, reviewers PASS.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/office-components-reposition-fix-20260614/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/office-components-reposition-fix-20260614/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
